"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.GroupingError) column "owner_changes.oldvalue__c" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
LINE 26:       WHEN oldvalue__c IS NULL OR oldvalue__c = 'None' OR ol...
                    ^

[SQL: 
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10T00:00:00.000+0000'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10T23:59:59.999+0000'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
    AND oldvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
cases_handled AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN oldvalue__c IS NULL OR oldvalue__c = 'None' OR oldvalue__c = '' 
      THEN newvalue__c 
      ELSE newvalue__c 
    END as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None' 
    AND newvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(t.agent_id, c.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  COALESCE(c.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled
FROM transfers t
FULL OUTER JOIN cases_handled c ON t.agent_id = c.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(c.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 10;
]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10T00:00:00.000+0000'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10T23:59:59.999+0000'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
    AND oldvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
cases_handled AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN oldvalue__c IS NULL OR oldvalue__c = 'None' OR oldvalue__c = '' 
      THEN newvalue__c 
      ELSE newvalue__c 
    END as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None' 
    AND newvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(t.agent_id, c.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  COALESCE(c.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled
FROM transfers t
FULL OUTER JOIN cases_handled c ON t.agent_id = c.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(c.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10T00:00:00.000+0000'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10T23:59:59.999+0000'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
    AND oldvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
cases_handled AS (
  SELECT 
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
    AND newvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(tc.agent_id, ch.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  COALESCE(ch.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled
FROM transfer_counts tc
FULL OUTER JOIN cases_handled ch ON tc.agent_id = ch.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(ch.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM oldvalue__c) as oldvalue__c,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM newvalue__c) as newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10T00:00:00.000+0000'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10T23:59:59.999+0000'
),
clean_owner_changes AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    CASE WHEN oldvalue__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(oldvalue__c, 2) ELSE oldvalue__c END as oldvalue__c,
    CASE WHEN newvalue__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(newvalue__c, 2) ELSE newvalue__c END as newvalue__c,
    createddate
  FROM owner_changes
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM clean_owner_changes
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
    AND oldvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
),
cases_handled AS (
  SELECT 
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM clean_owner_changes
  WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c != 'None'
    AND newvalue__c != ''
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(tc.agent_id, ch.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  COALESCE(ch.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled
FROM transfer_counts tc
FULL OUTER JOIN cases_handled ch ON tc.agent_id = ch.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(ch.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
